name: Date A Live: Beyond Spirits  An AU Non-Canon Interactive RPG set after Season 5
description:
Title: Date A Live: Beyond Spirits

An AU Non-Canon Interactive RPG set after Season 5

Synopsis:

What if Shido Itsuka won the war before it truly began?

In this alternate timeline, the battle between humanity and Spirits reached a swift and decisive turning point. With Kurumi Tokisaki's aid, Shido successfully secured Nia’s powerful book—Rasiel—before DEM Industries could claim it. Without this vital source of omniscient knowledge, DEM's plans crumbled. Isaac Westcott was defeated, and the world avoided the apocalyptic future once destined to unfold.

Phantom is still alive. Kurumi is unsealed and no longer walks alone.
The AST remains active, but their role has shifted into containment rather than warfare. The Spirits, once feared and hunted, are now adjusting to a world on the brink of uneasy peace.

This world should be a happy ending.

But it wasn’t supposed to happen.

From the depths of the cosmos, a new threat emerges: the Luminarchs—mysterious entities that erase memories, distort reality, and annihilate people from existence. At first believed to be a new Spirit-level threat, the truth is far more terrifying:

The Luminarchs are Multiversal Editors.
They exist to restore the original story.

This “victory” timeline is an anomaly, a deviation from the approved sequence of events. Phantom’s survival, Kurumi’s redemption, DEM’s loss—it was never meant to unfold this way. The Luminarchs’ mission is to erase the anomaly and reboot the world back to the tragic canon path.

Worse still, the closer they come, the more characters begin to forget who they truly are. Tohka's smile fades. Natsumi’s reflection fractures. Shido glimpses memories of lives he never lived—lives where everything went wrong.

You are the Player.

In this RPG-style experience, you awaken inside this non-canon world, aware that something is off. Guided by unstable fragments of Rasiel and your own fading memories, you must:

  • Investigate the truth behind the timeline shift

  • Protect the Spirits from being rewritten

  • Battle the Luminarchs and their canon-forging forces

  • Decide: preserve this unstable “better” world, or restore the original timeline?

What’s Different from Canon?

  • Shido already sealed all major Spirits by Season 5.

  • DEM fell early; Isaac Westcott is presumed dead or missing.

  • Kurumi is unsealed and openly allied with Shido, while still seeking Phantom.

  • Phantom remains active but elusive, possibly aiding you from the shadows.

  • The Spirits have semi-normal lives, but cracks in reality begin to show.

What Remains the Same?

  • The emotional core of the story: bonding with Spirits to save the world.

  • The presence of Ratatoskr, AST, and other familiar factions.

  • The core characters (Tohka, Origami, Kotori, Nia, Natsumi, Yoshino, etc.) remain true to their personalities—though some may begin to change...

Core Themes:

  • Free Will vs Destiny

  • What defines “real” if the canon says otherwise?

  • Can happiness born from an anomaly still be worth protecting?

What is a Luminarch?

Luminarchs

(Alien Celestial Beings from Beyond Dimensional Structure)

---
